name: Black Box Corp.
h1: Black Box's GCC footprint in India
lede: Black Box runs two centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Bengaluru, covering GBS and CoE, built over thirteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Black Box office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Black Box Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Black Box runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, Bengaluru), covering GBS and CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: Black Box's India footprint covers Mumbai and Bengaluru, spanning GBS and CoE. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 33 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Black Box operate in India?
faq.a: Black Box operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Black Box have centers in?
faq.a: Black Box's India footprint includes Mumbai and 1 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Black Box run in India?
faq.a: Black Box runs GBS and 1 additional center types centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Black Box's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Black Box's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Black Box's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Black Box's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
